# AI Knowledge Base

## Overview
This site provides a comprehensive knowledge base about Artificial Intelligence, including latest news, model comparisons, and tools.

## Key Sections
- /#/hot-news: Latest AI News and Updates
- /#/models: Comparison of AI Models (GPT, Claude, etc.)
- /#/tools: AI Tools and Resources
- /#/articles: In-depth Articles

## Content Format
Content is structured in sections with topics, questions, and answers.
The site supports English (en) and Hebrew (he).

## API
- /api/hot-news/:lang (GET): Retrieve news data
- /api/hot-news/:lang (POST): Add news items
